patterns.name: Coordinator Pattern
patterns.description: Skills coordinate work; agents execute. Contains 'coordinator' language.
patterns.message: Pattern 1 (Coordinator): Consider adding coordinator language (delegate, dispatch) to clarify that this skill coordinates rather than executes work directly.

patterns.name: Numbered Steps
patterns.description: All step headers match '## Step N -- [Action]' format
patterns.message: Pattern 2 (Numbered Steps): All workflow steps must use format '## Step N -- [Action]' or '## Step N — [Action]'.

patterns.name: Tool Declarations
patterns.description: Every step contains a 'Tool:' line specifying which tool to use
patterns.message: Pattern 3 (Tool Declarations): Most steps should explicitly declare which tool they use with a 'Tool:' line. Coordinator/verdict steps may omit this.

patterns.name: Verdict Gates
patterns.description: At least one step contains verdict logic (PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED or CURRENT/UPDATES_NEEDED)
patterns.message: Pattern 4 (Verdict Gates): Skill must include at least one verdict gate (e.g., PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED or CURRENT/UPDATES_NEEDED) to control workflow progression.

patterns.name: Timestamped Artifacts
patterns.description: References to [timestamp] or ISO datetime patterns
patterns.message: Pattern 5 (Timestamped Artifacts): Consider using timestamped filenames (e.g., [timestamp] placeholder or ISO format) for artifact outputs.

patterns.name: Structured Reporting
patterns.message: Pattern 6 (Structured Reporting): Skill outputs should typically be written to ./plans/ directory for consistency.

patterns.name: Bounded Iterations
patterns.description: If revision loop exists, has 'Max N revision' language
patterns.message: Pattern 7 (Bounded Iterations): If skill includes a revision loop, specify maximum iterations (e.g., 'Max 2 revision rounds').

patterns.name: Model Selection
patterns.message: Pattern 8 (Model Selection): YAML frontmatter must include a 'model:' field specifying which Claude model to use.

patterns.name: Scope Parameters
patterns.description: '## Inputs' section exists with reference to inputs/arguments
patterns.message: Pattern 9 (Scope Parameters): Skill must have an '## Inputs' section documenting what parameters it accepts.

patterns.name: Archive on Success
patterns.description: Reference to ./plans/archive/ or explicit archive step
patterns.message: Pattern 10 (Archive on Success): Consider moving artifacts to ./plans/archive/ on successful completion to keep the plans directory clean.

structural_requirements.name: Valid YAML Frontmatter
structural_requirements.description: File starts with --- markers containing YAML metadata
structural_requirements.message: Skill must start with valid YAML frontmatter delimited by --- markers.

structural_requirements.name: Required Frontmatter Fields
structural_requirements.message: YAML frontmatter must contain: name, description, and model fields.

structural_requirements.name: Workflow Header
structural_requirements.message: Skill must have a '# /[skill-name] Workflow' header matching the skill name.

structural_requirements.name: Minimum Steps
structural_requirements.message: Skill must have at least 2 numbered workflow steps.

structural_requirements.name: Non-Empty Steps
structural_requirements.description: No step header is followed immediately by another step header
structural_requirements.message: Every step must have content. Empty steps are not allowed.

reference.description: Behavioral discipline documents (Iron Laws, principles, gates). Not executable workflows.
